creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: pawel
Date: Wed Jan 29 21:05:31 2014
New Revision: 341782
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/341782
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r341782/

Log:
  - Update to 20140122 [1]
  - Convert USE_GMAKE to USES=gmake
  - Support staging
  
  PR:		ports/186042 [1]
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/net/scamper/Makefile
  head/net/scamper/distinfo
  head/net/scamper/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net/scamper/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net/scamper/Makefile	Wed Jan 29 21:01:51 2014	(r341781)
+++ head/net/scamper/Makefile	Wed Jan 29 21:05:31 2014	(r341782)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	scamper
-PORTVERSION=	20130824
+PORTVERSION=	20140122
 CATEGORIES=	net ipv6
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.caida.org/tools/measurement/scamper/code/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-cvs-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -9,15 +9,8 @@ DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-cvs-${PORTVERSION}
 MAINTAINER=	mjl@luckie.org.nz
 COMMENT=	Tool for parallelised IPv4 and IPv6 measurement
 
+USES=		gmake
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
 
-MAN1=		scamper.1 sc_ally.1 sc_analysis_dump.1 sc_attach.1 \
-		sc_ipiddump.1 sc_speedtrap.1 sc_tracediff.1 sc_warts2json.1 \
-		sc_warts2pcap.1 sc_warts2text.1 sc_wartscat.1 sc_wartsdump.1
-MAN3=		libscamperfile.3
-MAN5=		warts.5
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

+SIZE (scamper-cvs-20140122.tar.gz) = 1211605
